description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'SystemMonitorDashboard' WPF application. Refactor the hardcoded styles and brushes from the <Window.Resources> section of MainWindow.xaml into a new application-scoped Resource Dictionary named 'Theme.xaml'. Merge 'Theme.xaml' into the application resources in App.xaml and ensure the solution builds without StaticResource resolution errors.
